text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Back in spring, when I'd just been accepted to Tracen Academy... I
remember my mother poring over the school pamphlet with a big grin.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
"This academy really puts a lot of effort into student life. Look,
they've even got events in the dorms for Halloween and the winter
holidays!"

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
"You're sure to make all sorts of friends. Oh, Rob Roy, you're going to
have so much fun at school!"

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(The first step to making friends is making good first impressions. I've
practiced a bunch of ice breakers—I can do this!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Why am I like this?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (Wait, that's right! I've got a roommate now. If anyone, I have to make friends with her!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Uh, um...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I'm, uh...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(Hold on. She'd probably think I'm weird if I suddenly asked her to be
friends out of nowhere.)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (Begging like that would just be admitting that I don't have any friends... And then she'd definitely steer clear of me...)
Squeeze.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Eh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry! My mother used to hold my hand like that when I was
nervous, and it always made me feel better...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm really sorry though! I hope you didn't mind it too much...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: N-not at all! I, um, I actually—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I was hoping we could be friends!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (Rice always jumps right into action when someone else needs help.)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (She's been itching to say something to Bourbon.)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (It's written all over her face, but I haven't done anything to help—and I don't know what I possibly could do.)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(After all, it'd only make things weird if I tried to facilitate a
discussion. Maybe someone else could, though. Someone more
conversational than me...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (But deep down... I just...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh. "Get your ghoul on"... "Dress up and unleash your inner devil"...
"Explore your fantasies"...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: "Dead men do tell tales in this park-wide costume party. A limited-time dream world awaits—Halloween Land!"

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: This is it! If I invite everyone, then...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Several flaws detected in current Halloween party plans. Update
needed to execute mission successfully.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Projections show risk of error in next week's schedule. Primary
concern—processing prop orders—has already been completed.
Attempting to identify other sources of error...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Last night, I was going to talk to Bourbon. But then I saw Tamamo and
Creek...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
They didn't need me. I would've just been in everyone's way... I got so
scared, thinking awful things, and the next thing I knew—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
(I should stay out of their business. Worrying and fussing isn't going
to accomplish anything.)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: (I always go making things worse, so this time, I'll—)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: H-hey you two! I order you... to be my familiars!

text_block_list.name: Rice & Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Huh?
What?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I-I'm talking to you two!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: To... us? Even me?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I've got a task for you both! I require familiars to escort me to
the theme park!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
They're holding a Halloween event, but it wouldn't be as fun alone.
Every good witch knows that three heads are better than one.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And it'll be suuuuuper fun, or so I've heard! Inari said she used it as
inspiration for planning last year's party.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: A-anyway, it'll be a blast, and I really wanna go! So, um...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to turn you into my familiars with magic and make you go
with me! I-if you don't mind!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Student
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo, what should I dooo?! I was trying to mend this shirt, but look
what I did...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ah, don't sweat it! I'll fix it up later, so leave it there for me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
All that's left is to check the costumes for Miho Dorm, right? We
should start rounding up the students who haven't been fitted.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and while we're at it, I'll check up on how Bourbon's gettin'
along.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I heard Bourbon's going to that crazy scary theme park! She's
been struggling with party ideas, so I guess she's going for inspo.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: What, by herself? She's not taking on that place alone, is she? ...But I doubt she'd let us tag along. Sigh. I wish she'd rely on us more.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Here we go again... Yeesh. Creek, would you mind comin' with?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, not at all! I'll go get ready. ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wow, look at all the cute little pumpkins! And the dancers' costumes
are so floofy!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, while I agree, that's not what we're here for. Or, um... Move it,
you two! We've got places to be!

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Gruoooorgh... Aauuuuurgh...

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Noise
text_block_list.text: Rustle... Rustle... Creak.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: W-well, looks like this is... the place...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crack! Rumble...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Everyone! Hold on to your tails! Hurry—before they get taken!

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Rice & Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: AAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice! Rob Roy!

With an echoing shriek, Rice Shower and Zenno Rob Roy bolt, deaf
to Bourbon's attempt to stop them. However, only a zombie-infested
horrorscape lies ahead...
What nightmares await the three here—none can know.
